_meta.description: Synthetic occupational skills database covering 100+ roles across tech, healthcare, finance, engineering, education, legal, trades, and more.
_meta.source: Inspired by the U.S. Department of Labor's O*NET framework. All data is synthetic and curated for this project.
_meta.note: Used as a fallback when AI or live job data is unavailable. Skills, certifications, and experience ranges reflect real-world requirements.
